creator: grahamperrin@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Mark Johnston from comment #3)

Please, which build of CURRENT did you have at the time? 

For me, it's still consistently reproducible at <https://bitmovin.com/demos/drm>. 

1500027, <https://cgit.freebsd.org/src/log/?qt=range&q=dfa0ac74c2fb&h=main> (2024-11-15 02:32:20).

Around ten minutes before the automated restart, YMMV. 

% pkg iinfo ^htop linux-widevine-cdm
htop-3.3.0_5
linux-widevine-cdm-4.10.2830.0
% su -
Password:
root@mowa219-gjp4-zbook-freebsd:~ # cat /var/crash/info.last 
Dump header from device: /dev/ada1p2
  Architecture: amd64
  Architecture Version: 2
  Dump Length: 3714994176
  Blocksize: 512
  Compression: none
  Dumptime: 2024-11-15 21:23:02 +0000
  Hostname: mowa219-gjp4-zbook-freebsd
  Magic: FreeBSD Kernel Dump
  Version String: FreeBSD 15.0-CURRENT main-n273650-dfa0ac74c2fb GENERIC
  Panic String: condition vp->v_type == VDIR || VN_IS_DOOMED(vp) not met at /home/pkgbuild/worktrees/main/sys/kern/vfs_cache.c:3472 (vn_fullpath_dir)
  Dump Parity: 3187423817
  Bounds: 9
  Dump Status: good
root@mowa219-gjp4-zbook-freebsd:~ # exit
logout
% grep BOOT /var/log/messages | tail -n 1
Nov 15 21:32:45 mowa219-gjp4-zbook-freebsd kernel: ---<<BOOT>>---
%
